notes.subjects: Use lowercase snake_case with a namespace prefix like user:<id>, person:<id>, system:<name>, feature:<name>, project:<slug>.
notes.values: Normalize values per predicate. Trim whitespace, collapse internal spaces, and enforce case rules where specified.
notes.provenance: Record source and trust score when available. Prefer system-of-record over ad hoc notes when conflicts arise.

preferred_language.notes: Choose the most recent or highest-trust entry when multiple exist; keep lower-trust entries in quarantine if contradictory.

spoken_languages.notes: Multi-valued set. Additive unless explicitly contradicted by the same source; prefer corroboration from multiple sources.

salary.notes: Treat HR system as system-of-record. Conflicts should be quarantined pending manual review.

server_port.notes: Use numeric string normalization; conflicts may indicate environment-specific values.

normalization.number: strip non-numeric characters where safe; preserve minus/decimal; trim
normalization.currency: parse '<CURRENCY> <AMOUNT>' into canonical 'USD 120000' (no commas), store as string; optional cents not required
